final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [3:0] obf_Q
);always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            obf_Q <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (enable) begin
            if (obf_Q == 4'b1111) begin
                obf_Q <= 4'b0000;
            end else begin
                obf_Q <= obf_Q + 1;
            end
        end
    end

endmodule
